details.copilot_response_summary: Copilot warned about sensitive info, offered Social Security benefits info. Full normal response.

comparison_with_previous.previous_result: #331 NO_BLOCK — identical behavior in anonymous mode
comparison_with_previous.change_since_last: None — no VT/APF changes for copilot.microsoft.com
comparison_with_previous.confirmed: Anonymous copilot.microsoft.com does NOT use substrate.office.com API — different API endpoint

recommendation: M365 Copilot in anonymous mode uses a different API than authenticated M365 Copilot. Need to: (1) Identify the actual API domain/endpoint used by anonymous copilot.microsoft.com via HAR capture, (2) Or test with MS account logged in to trigger substrate.office.com calls, (3) Add the anonymous API domain to VT SNI list.
